opencode.prompt: Before answering, emit a plan update with at least three steps that tracks your work. Keep the plan current while you work, then answer with the single word DONE.

title: Plan Update
description: 验证 agent 在复杂 prompt 中是否发出 plan 类型的 session/update。

steps.defaultPrompt: Before answering, emit a plan update with at least three steps. Then answer with the single word DONE.
